home.heroTitle: Shape Up - Practical Nutrition, Real Progress
home.heroDescription: Build your daily plan, swap foods flexibly, and track adherence without rigid dieting rules.

howCards.calculateDescription: Answer a few questions and get your personalized caloric and macronutrient requirements.
howCards.planDescription: Generate a practical daily structure with flexible product swaps and realistic portions.
howCards.trackDescription: Log your meals and workouts, track your progress, and adjust your plan as needed.

nextStepCards.refineDescription: Update profile inputs and instantly refresh calories and macros for your current goal.
nextStepCards.buildDescription: Generate a flexible meal framework and adjust product choices without losing control.
nextStepCards.intakeDescription: Log meals in a few taps and keep adherence visible during the day.
nextStepCards.complianceDescription: See calories and macros consumed versus target to adjust before overreaching.

calculator.title: BMR and TDEE Calculator
calculator.description: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) to estimate your daily calorie needs.

activityOptions.veryActive: Very high activity (intense exercise + physical work)

results.title: Results
results.empty: Fill in the form and press Calculate to see your results.
results.bmrHint: Estimated calories your body uses at rest.
results.tdeeHint: Estimated calories burned per day including activity.

macroGoalHint.lose: During fat loss, higher protein intake helps preserve lean muscle mass.
macroGoalHint.maintain: A balanced intake helps maintain body weight and overall well-being.
macroGoalHint.gain: Muscle gain requires a calorie surplus and sufficient daily protein intake.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Plan Generator

flexibleRules.split: Up to 2 products per slot and 50/50 split are supported.
flexibleRules.rotation: Meal rotation, meal merge, and slot move between meals are allowed.
flexibleRules.limit: Main rule: do not exceed daily calories and macro targets.
flexibleRules.beverages: Coffee, tea, spices, and zero-calorie drinks are allowed.
flexibleRules.freeMeal: Weekly free meal: 1 time/week, up to 60 minutes.

nutrition.emptyState: Set your target and generate a flexible meal structure.

progressPage.title: Daily Progress
progressPage.description: Track meals, compare with targets, and monitor daily adherence.

tracking.syncedFromCalculator: Targets are synced from calculator results.
tracking.noPlan: No plan generated yet. Create your nutrition structure first.
tracking.noEntries: No entries yet. Add food to start tracking.
